query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a tree-lined sidewalk covered in fallen leaves, running parallel to a road. Multiple street lamps cast an orange-tinted light across the pavement and foliage, while dark shadows fill the spaces between the posts. Streaks of light from a passing vehicle are visible on the distant road, and a low wall borders the right edge of the walkway.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of a tree-lined sidewalk covered in fallen leaves, running parallel to a road. Multiple sodium vapor street lamps bathe the entire scene in a sickly orange color cast, shifting the leaves, pavement, and tree bark toward unsettling amber hues. Streaks of light from a passing vehicle are visible on the distant road, deep shadows occupy the spaces between posts, and a low wall borders the right edge of the walkway.
